CVE-2021-39371.title: An XML external entity (XXE) injection in PyWPS before 4.4.5 allo ...
CVE-2021-39371.summary: An XML external entity (XXE) injection in PyWPS before 4.4.5 allows an attacker to view files on the application server filesystem by assigning a path to the entity. OWSLib 0.24.1 may also be affected.
